task_completion.description: Verify the Lead was created for David Miller at Maersk Logistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Lead detail page or list view in Vtiger CRM showing the name 'David Miller' and the company 'Maersk Logistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lead has the correct Source, Status, and Industry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Lead detail page, check that Lead Source is 'Cold Call', Lead Status is 'Contact in Future', and Industry is 'Transportation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Event (Call) was logged with the correct basic details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Event or Activity record with Subject 'Initial Discovery Call', Activity Type 'Call', Status 'Held', Start Date '2026-03-08', and Time '10:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Event description contains the required notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Event details, the description field should contain: 'Prospect answered but is currently traveling. Mentioned they are reviewing freight software next quarter.'

task_completion.description: Verify the follow-up Task (To Do) was scheduled with the correct basic details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Task or To Do record with Subject 'Send Maersk Pricing Deck', Status 'Not Started', Priority 'High', and Due Date '2026-03-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Task description contains the required instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Task details, the description field should contain: 'Send the Q2 pricing deck to David before the next follow-up call.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM graphical user interface in a web browser, not API testing tools or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL, SQLite, or shell commands injecting data directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the records were saved and not just typed into unsaved forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the detail views of the saved Lead, Event, and Task records, or a confirmation message indicating successful creation, rather than just filled-out edit forms.
